body_txt: So you're a Fish out of Temporal Water who's just come back to the world either through Time Travel , cryosleep , coming Back from the Dead , or maybe you've just been away for a while. You've surely missed out on a lot, so you better study up! Whether through intense reading, television, the internet, or other means, this trope is when a character catches up on history through some sort of means. The Bunker Woman might also do this, along with the Cult Defector . May be a part of Not Used to Freedom for some.
